back_translation: A psalm of David, for remembrance.
O LORD, do not rebuke me in Your anger, nor discipline me in Your wrath.
For Your arrows have sunk deep into me, and Your hand has pressed down on me.
There is no soundness in my body because of Your anger; there is no peace in my bones because of my sin.
For my iniquities have gone over my head; like a heavy burden they are too heavy for me to bear.
My wounds are foul and festering because of my sinful folly.
I am bent down and brought very low; all day long I go about mourning.
For my loins are full of burning pain, and there is no soundness in my body.
I am faint and badly crushed; I groan because of the anguish of my heart.
O Lord, all my desire is before You, and my sighing is not hidden from You.
My heart pounds, my strength fails, and even the light of my eyes has gone from me.
My loved ones and friends keep away from my disease, and my kinsmen stand far off.
Those who seek my life lay snares; those who wish me harm speak of destruction and plot deceit all day long.
But I am like a deaf man who does not hear, and like a mute man who does not open his mouth.
I am like a man who does not hear, and in whose mouth there is no reply.
For in You, O LORD, I hope; You will answer, O Lord my God.
For I said, 'Let them not gloat over me'; when my foot slips, they exalt themselves against me.
For I am about to fall, and my pain is ever with me.
I confess my iniquity; I am troubled because of my sin.
My enemies are vigorous and mighty, and many are those who hate me wrongfully.
Those who repay my good with evil are my adversaries because I pursue what is good.
O LORD, do not forsake me; O my God, do not be far from me.
Come quickly to help me, O Lord, my salvation.
